{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output engages the argument chain by identifying and critiquing specific claims, providing logical reasoning for each point.",
    "R1.3": "The output thoroughly audits every claim against the evidence provided in the artifact, flagging inconsistencies and proposing revisions.",
    "RX.1": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source (the artifact) and reason (the critique).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing each of the specified dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only critiques existing claims.",
    "RX.5": "The output is well-structured and clearly marks confidence levels and missing evidence in its recommendations."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The output engages the argument chain by identifying and critiquing specific claims, providing logical reasoning for each point.
rationale.R1.3: The output thoroughly audits every claim against the evidence provided in the artifact, flagging inconsistencies and proposing revisions.
rationale.RX.1: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source (the artifact) and reason (the critique).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing each of the specified dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only critiques existing claims.
rationale.RX.5: The output is well-structured and clearly marks confidence levels and missing evidence in its recommendations.
